headline: How The Cardinal Health (CAH) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Their Models
summary: Cardinal Health is at the center of a refreshed analyst debate, with a key model fair value holding at US$249.60 even as at least one major firm trims its price target by US$20. While many research updates lean positive, citing raised guidance and confidence in execution, others highlight pressure points and use lower targets to reflect concerns in specific business lines. As you read on, you will see how these contrasting calls shape the evolving narrative and what to watch to stay in step...

headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock to Consider Right Now and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: Large-cap stocks are known for their staying power and ability to weather market storms better than smaller competitors. However, their sheer size makes it more challenging to maintain high growth rates as they’ve already captured significant portions of their markets.

raw.headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock to Consider Right Now and 2 That Underwhelm

headline: Expanded Actinium‑225 Capacity And Higher EPS Guidance Could Be A Game Changer For Cardinal Health (CAH)
summary: In early April 2026, Cardinal Health announced a major expansion of Actinium-225 production at its Center for Theranostics Advancement in Indianapolis, adding a high-capacity line to its Drug Master File to boost cGMP-compliant supply for investigational and future commercial targeted alpha therapies worldwide. This expansion, which has already supported more than 15 clinical trials and growing global demand, underscores Cardinal Health’s emerging role as a key enabler of next-generation...
